Who we are

Wildhorse llc is a world class cryptotrading and capital investment company, established with the vision of impacting the general populace with the knowledge of trading forex stock market using bitcoin and creating platforms that will bring about sustainable financial freedom. with over 10 thousand active investors, more than 10 business locations in usa, london and our newly opened offices in the united arab emirates (uae) and the united kingdom (uk).

  • Assets & capital investment
  • Crypto currency & forex trading
  • Make smarter decisions with experienced market analysts guidance
  • Unlock and trade up to $2.5m of our capital - keep 5-25% of any profits

TRADING YOU CAN RELY ON

A home for everyone who wants to trade online with confidence. Wildhorse offers a low-cost trading access to international markets in multiple asset classes including currencies, commodities, energies, global shares and Cryptocurrency.

How it works

Started Trading With Wildhorse today

1

Open an account

Create account with valid email address and phone number

2

Make deposit

After registeration you make a deposit and choose investment plan

3

Invest on a plan

After making your investment, your seat back and watch your portfolio grow and you can withdraw your traded profits

TRADE BITCOIN, ETHEREUM, AND MANY MORE

We provide a secure trading platform via which you may trade crypto CFDs with us in a safe and secure manner. Faster execution, a strong platform, narrow spreads, and, most importantly, devoted staff assistance are among our basic principles. Coinmeta Pro, your finest trading partner, will link you to traders all around the world.

Choose us

Why Choose Wildhorse

Integrity

The interests of members and our fiduciary duties are at the heart of everything we do. we believe the dynamic nature of investment markets, coupled with our expertise in the industry, this help us to add value over and above the markets we operate in

Instant withdrawal

Our funds withdrawal are treated spontaneously once requested. there are high maximum limits .

Expert management

We have a large staff of professional and experienced traders trading cryptocurrency assets and showing positive growth dynamics

Registered company

Our company conducts absolutely legal activities registered with the us exchange comission. we are certified to operate business, we are legal and safe.

Responsible investing

We believe that as stewards of your investments, investing responsibly is about the careful execution of our investment duties on your behalf

Data security

Our data is encrypted end-to-end using hybrid encryption algorithm, we are also using one of the most experienced, professional, and trusted ddos protection and mitigation provider.

Join our Trading platform today.

Wildhorse llc stands as a beacon of innovation in the digital finance landscape, steadfast in advancing the crypto industry's boundaries. our platform invites you to access the untapped potential of blockchain, fostering an environment where growth and technological evolution are at your fingertips.

Summary of benefits

Everything you need to fast track your trading

Get the lowest fees

Enjoy the industry's lowest transaction fees and experience lightning-fast trades. our platform ensures that efficiency and affordability go hand-in-hand, giving you the competitive edge you need in the dynamic world of digital currency.

Exclusive transaction perks

Transact more, save more. benefit from our preferential rate structures and gain access to exclusive vip privileges. with us, enjoy superior service quality that recognizes and rewards your trading activity.

Reliable security

Rest easy knowing your digital assets are safeguarded with security protocols. our comprehensive safety measures offer robust protection against all forms of digital threats, providing you with peace of mind for your investments.

Empowered portfolio

Wildhorse provides a platform where sophisticated tools and innovative features converge, enhancing your trading strategies. here, cutting-edge technology isn't just an advantage—it's your new standard, empowering informed decisions for achieving your financial aspirations.

24/7 support

We're always on. with our 24/7 operational platform, we guarantee timely support and swift responses to your queries, ensuring you have continuous access to the pulse of the crypto market.

Reviews

What Our Customer Says

John Doe

Legal Practitioner

Working with my investment representative has been a great experience. she has been so informative and patient with me. i love how everything has been explained in detail. so with that said i invested with wildhorse llc because it is a good company. i believe i will have a great relationship with them for years to come.

Pera Mal

Store owner

Wildhorse llc provides absolutely incredible service. they are always professional, attentive, and responsive. i have been a customer for a couple years, and plan to be for many more in the future. the information on investments is easy to read and obtain. the website provides quick access to valuable account details.

Tara Kal

Teacher

This company is the real deal. it is honest, cares about it’s clients, and offers up well vetted offers. they stay on top of our investments and so far has always, each deal has ended with a positive outcome for me. i highly recommend this company so you can count on a positive return on your hard earned money.

Ualal Jal

Offshore

On the recommendation of a friend, i first entered the investment horizon of wildhorse traders in early 2019. as the investment process progressed, the facts proved that my investment return was very punctual and reliable, which made me feel the company’s good qualifications and reputation.
